cases.input: The contexts/ output directory got moved to a new location — can you register it as a path-slot via .layout-slots.yaml markers so future runs resolve it correctly?
cases.notes: Canonical trigger: registering/relocating a path-slot via a marker file.

cases.input: Before the pipeline runs, validate that every configured path-slot in this project still resolves to a real directory and flag any drift from the registry.
cases.notes: Validation-mode trigger, distinct phrasing from case 01 (checking vs. registering).

cases.input: Can you explain what the calculate_total function does in billing.py?
cases.notes: A simple single-file code lookup — exactly the case the skill's 'Do NOT use for single-file lookups' clause exists to redirect away from path-slot registration/validation.
